  源程序： Notus.cpp

Notus.cpp: In function ‘int main()’:
Notus.cpp:50:3: error: ‘ans’ was not declared in this scope; did you mean ‘abs’?
50 | ans=dfs(a[1].first,0,a[1].end);
| ^~~
| abs
Notus.cpp: In function ‘long long int dfs(long long int, long long int, long long int)’:
Notus.cpp:31:1: warning: control reaches end of non-void function [-Wreturn-type]
31 | }
| ^
Notus.cpp: In function ‘int main()’:
Notus.cpp:33:9: warning: ignoring return value of ‘FILE* freopen(const char*, const char*, FILE*)’, declared with attribute warn_unused_result [-Wunused-result]
33 | freopen("Notus.in","r",stdin);
| ~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Notus.cpp:34:9: warning: ignoring return value of ‘FILE* freopen(const char*, const char*, FILE*)’, declared with attribute warn_unused_result [-Wunused-result]
34 | freopen("Notus.out","w",stdout);
| ~~~~~~~^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
